description: 25 diverse IT scenarios — Set X (post Gemini-first + supervisor fixes)

cases.title: YubiKey Not Recognized After Update
cases.description: YubiKey hardware security key not detected by laptop USB ports after Windows update. Cannot complete FIDO2 login to corporate apps.

cases.title: BEC Email Forwarding Rule Added
cases.description: Security incident: mailbox audit shows hidden inbox rule forwarding all mail to external Gmail. User did not create the rule.

cases.title: Traceroute Shows High Latency to SaaS
cases.description: Traceroute to Salesforce shows 300ms+ latency via ISP hop. Only affecting users on guest Wi-Fi VLAN.

cases.title: Oracle RAC Instance Crash
cases.description: Oracle RAC node 2 crashed with ORA-00600. Application connection storms failing on remaining node.

cases.title: New Intern O365 License Assignment
cases.description: Intern starts Monday — need Microsoft 365 E3 license and Teams phone number assigned. HR ticket HR-8821 approved.

cases.title: AutoCAD License Checkout Failed
cases.description: AutoCAD network license checkout fails with all licenses in use. FlexLM server reachable but checkout times out.

cases.title: Rogue Access Point Detected
cases.description: Security incident: wireless IDS flagged rogue AP broadcasting CORP-SSID on parking garage level P2. Possible evil twin attack.

cases.title: Site-to-Site IPsec Tunnel Down
cases.description: IPsec VPN tunnel between AWS VPC and on-prem datacenter down. Phase 2 negotiation failing after cipher suite change.

cases.title: DynamoDB Throttling Errors
cases.description: Production API returning ProvisionedThroughputExceededException on DynamoDB table. Auto-scaling enabled but not keeping up.

cases.title: Biometric Login Not Working Windows Hello
cases.description: Windows Hello fingerprint reader stopped working after driver update. PIN login still works.

cases.title: Slack Workflow Webhook Failing
cases.description: Slack workflow posting to internal webhook returns 500. Other Slack features work. Started after cert renewal on webhook endpoint.

cases.title: Shared Mailbox Delegation Missing
cases.description: Cannot send as shared mailbox support@company.com after team restructure. Full access works but Send As permission missing.

cases.title: NFS Mount Stale File Handle
cases.description: Linux app servers report Stale file handle on NFS mount to NetApp. Batch jobs failing to read input files.

cases.title: CrowdStrike False Positive Blocked Build
cases.description: Security incident: CrowdStrike quarantined signed internal build agent. All CI pipelines blocked company-wide.

cases.title: Multicast Storm on Access Switch
cases.description: Access switch stack on floor 9 showing high CPU from multicast storm. Users report severe network slowness.

cases.title: Python Pandas Script Memory Error
cases.description: Local Python pandas script crashes with MemoryError on 16GB laptop when processing 2GB CSV. Need guidance or server runtime.

cases.title: Privileged SAP Role Assignment
cases.description: Need SAP_ALL role assigned for emergency production fix. CIO approval attached, time-bound 2 hour access required.

cases.title: Tape Backup Library Door Open Alert
cases.description: Backup exec reports tape library door open sensor triggered. Physical tape library in datacenter row C.

cases.title: InfluxDB Retention Policy Deleting Data
cases.description: InfluxDB time-series data missing for last 48 hours. Retention policy may have dropped measurements prematurely.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Live Event Failing
cases.description: Teams live event for all-hands fails at setup — producer cannot start broadcast. Standard Teams meetings work.

cases.title: SSL Cert Pinning Failure Mobile App
cases.description: Security incident: corporate mobile app rejects API calls after cert rotation — certificate pinning mismatch in production.

cases.title: 802.1X Auth Failing New Laptops
cases.description: New laptop batch cannot authenticate on wired 802.1X ports. Certificate provisioning profile may not be deployed.

cases.title: GPO Mapped Drive Not Appearing
cases.description: Group Policy mapped drive H: not appearing for users in new OU. gpresult shows GPO denied for drive maps.

cases.title: Label Printer ZPL Garbled Output
cases.description: Zebra label printer printing garbled ZPL barcode labels in warehouse. USB connection, driver reinstalled twice.

cases.title: Splunk Forwarder Stopped Sending Logs
cases.description: Splunk universal forwarder on 200 Linux hosts stopped sending logs. License warning in Splunk master dashboard.
